notes: Loop button is now an icon that cycles three states: ▶| Play once and stop, ↻¹ Loop the current track, ↻ Loop the entire folder. The icon itself communicates the mode — no more 'Loop: Off / One / All' text label. State 0 (Play once) used to advance through the folder until end; it now genuinely stops after the current track. States 1 and 2 unchanged.
